case_title: KEVIN M KNEAFSEY et al VS. SONNY TAN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD. FILED BY KNEAFSEY, KEVIN M MEVI, ASHLEY TAN, SONNY TAN, GLORIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-11-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS $1706.36 BY NOV 15, 2013 PURSUANT TO STIPULATED SETTLEMENT OF THE PARTIES", PER PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/8/13. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
